package.name: swarm_flocking
package.description: Autonomous drone swarm flocking package implementing the Vásárhelyi et al. optimized flocking model (Science Robotics 2018) with formation control (IROS 2014). Features decentralized control, evolutionary-optimized parameters, wall/obstacle avoidance via shill agents, and comprehensive safety monitoring over ROS2 DDS. Interfaces directly with PX4 autopilot via px4_msgs and the Micro XRCE-DDS bridge.
